## Problem

What user workflow is blocked or awkward?

## Proposed Behavior

What should NaviRouter do?

## Client Or Endpoint

Which client, Subsonic endpoint, or AudioMuse workflow does this affect?

## Security Notes

Does this change touch credentials, diagnostics, proxying, playlist writes, or public exposure?
